title: Context Profile Registry
description: Defines named context profiles. Each profile specifies which sections, files, and guardrails are active for a given session mode. Used by agents to load only the context relevant to the current task.

default_profile.description: Profile ID to use when no profile is explicitly activated.

profiles.description: Ordered list of context profiles. First matching trigger_condition wins.

description.description: When this profile is active and what it optimizes for.

trigger_conditions.description: Mini-DSL conditions evaluated at session start to auto-select this profile. Uses same op/left/right/var syntax as context_pack_router rules.

sections.description: Context sections to include, exclude, or make optional for this profile.

required_files.description: File paths (repo-relative) that must be loaded before any task begins in this profile.

optional_files.description: File paths that are loaded if present but not required.

guardrails_override.description: Per-profile overrides for guardrail settings. Unset keys inherit from base policy.

bootstrap_commands.description: Ops commands to run at profile activation to populate context.

tags.description: Free-form domain/scope labels for this profile (e.g. 'ops', 'ci', 'schema', 'roadmap'). Enables external domain queries without adding new profiles.

task_scope_hints.description: Scope qualifiers narrowing TASK_EXECUTION context (e.g. 'cockpit', 'schema', 'roadmap', 'evidence', 'ci'). Used by context pack router to select relevant required_files dynamically. Only meaningful on TASK_EXECUTION profile.

agent_notes.description: Behavioral guidance for agents operating in this profile.

required.description: Context pack sections that must be present.

optional.description: Context pack sections loaded if available.

forbidden.description: Context pack sections explicitly excluded from this profile.
